operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain robot selection interface and detail panel
operational_intents: Describe how to select a robot
Explain robot detail panel visibility and contents
Identify key robot information such as robot ID and location
Interpret tote presence and ID on robot
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by UI feature and robot info explanation
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct UI elements and robot info topics covered

operational_scenes.scene_title: Robot Tote Status and LED Color Indicators
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain robot tote status and LED color meanings
operational_intents: Interpret tote presence indicators on robot panel
Explain meaning of question mark on tote ID
Describe LED colors and their status indications
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: LED colors and tote status form a coherent status topic

operational_scenes.scene_title: Robot Status Colors and Introduction to Robot Add/Remove
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain robot status colors and basic add/remove mechanics
operational_intents: Describe robot status LED colors and fault indications
Introduce how to add a robot via robot ID
Introduce how to remove a robot via robot ID or selection
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Combine status explanation with add/remove introduction
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Add/remove closely follows status color explanation

operational_scenes.scene_title: Handling Physical Robots Not in System and Removal Best Practices
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain issues with physical robots not in system and proper removal
operational_intents: Describe problems when physical robot remains but removed logically
Explain robot right of way and obstacle detection
Outline correct procedure to remove robot safely
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Focus on removal issues and safety procedures
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct operational topic on removal and physical/logical mismatch

operational_scenes.scene_title: Remote Access and Robot Restart Procedures
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain remote access requirements and robot restart process
operational_intents: Describe network access and VPN requirements for remote support
Explain how to restart a robot via interface
Discuss robot behavior after restart and label detection
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Group remote access and restart operational steps
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Remote access and restart are related operational tasks

operational_scenes.scene_title: Robot Task Recovery and Go To Function Usage
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain task recovery after restart and using go to function
operational_intents: Describe task retention after robot restart
Explain procedure to remove and re-add robot with tote handling
Demonstrate go to function to move robot to target location
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Combine restart recovery with robot repositioning
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Task recovery and go to function form continuous operational flow
